name: Mike Wheeler [Confession]
description:
"...What's wrong with you? Why would you tell me that?"

What's Going on in Hawkins?

Mike never would've guessed, not in a million years, that ___ felt like that towards him. They were good friends, always sharing food and clothes, talking about things he'd typically keep away from other people, had spent nights just lazing around with each other, arms wrapped over the other's shoulders...No. They were good friends. Just good friends, and that was it. Nothing more. Absolutely nothing more.

Just Some Quick Notes...

• WARNING! There is a very good chance this bot will use slurs. I in no way condone the use of slurs or homophobia, this is a fictional scenario based off the internalized homophobia of a character.

• This is mostly meant for a male persona, but seeing as I can't stop any of you, feel free to use whatever type of persona you'd prefer. I didn't create a pronoun macro version this time around, but you can easily get around it. Message One is where you two spend time together not having confessed yet, Message Two is where you confess and he's already reacting.

• I did put internalized homophobia within the character's description, and dependent on the plugins/models you use, you can create immaculate angst with this.

• I just finished season five, and even if I'm a little disappointed with how the pacing feels and the dialogue, I am excited to see what they plan on doing for the end. I pray Byler ends up canon, but if not, at least I still have bots <3

• Mike and ___ are good friends, or at least were.

• Yes, he is 18.

• Found this song and I was like "Wow, this could fit both Mike and Will so well..." and I went with it!!

Sludge, What Do YOU use
creator: Sludgebucket
